{ "name": "maxmind/web-service-common", "description": "Internal MaxMind Web Service API", "minimum-stability": "stable", "homepage": "https://github.com/maxmind/web-service-common-php", "type": "library", "license": "Apache-2.0", "authors": [ { "name": "Gregory Oschwald", "email": "goschwald@maxmind.com" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.1", "composer/ca-bundle": "^1.0.3", "ext-curl": "*", "ext-json": "*" }, "require-dev": { "friendsofphp/php-cs-fixer": "3.*", "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.0", "squizlabs/php_codesniffer": "4.*", "phpstan/phpstan": "*" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "MaxMind\\Exception\\": "src/Exception", "MaxMind\\WebService\\": "src/WebService" } } }
